title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Piramal Finance South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Piramal Finance South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Piramal Finance South Asia Partners in Faridabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Piramal Finance South Asia Partners:
Piramal Finance South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Finance South Asia Partners!
